# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading all 5 projects from net8.0 to net10.0 using the All-at-Once strategy. Includes Azure Functions isolated worker migration, CPM setup, security vulnerability fixes, and inline API breaking change resolution.

**Progress**: 0/3 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%

- 🔲 02-upgrade-all-projects: Upgrade all projects to net10.0
- 🔲 03-final-validation: Final solution validation
